name: findsystemfontsfilename
documentation:
# FindSystemFontsFilename
[![FindSystemFontsFilename - CI Build Status](https://github.com/moi15moi/FindSystemFontsFilename/workflows/Run%20Tests/badge.svg)](https://github.com/moi15moi/FindSystemFontsFilename/actions/workflows/run_test.yml)
[![FindSystemFontsFilename - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/findsystemfontsfilename.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/FindSystemFontsFilename)
[![FindSystemFontsFilename - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/findsystemfontsfilename.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/FindSystemFontsFilename)

This tool allows you to get the font filename on your system. It will collect TrueType (.ttf), OpenType (.otf), TrueType Collection (.ttc) and OpenType Collection (.otc) font format.

It uses some APIs to find the font filename:
- Windows (Vista SP2 and more are supported): [DirectWrite API](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/directwrite/direct-write-portal) and [GDI API](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/gdi/windows-gdi)
- macOS (10.6 and more are supported): [Core Text API](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/coretext)
- Unix: [Fontconfig API](https://www.freedesktop.org/wiki/Software/fontconfig/)
- Android (SDK/API 29 and more are supported): [NDK Font API](https://developer.android.com/ndk/reference/group/font)

## Installation
```
pip install FindSystemFontsFilename
```

## How to use it
```python
from find_system_fonts_filename import get_system_fonts_filename, FindSystemFontsFilenameException

try:
    fonts_filename = get_system_fonts_filename()
except FindSystemFontsFilenameException:
    # Deal with the exception
    pass
```

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.system_fonts.SystemFonts.get_system_fonts_filename
documentation: Return an set of all the installed fonts filename.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.system_fonts.SystemFonts.install_font
documentation: Install a font from it's filename.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.system_fonts.SystemFonts.uninstall_font
documentation: Uninstall a font from it's filename.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.unix.unix_fonts.UnixFonts.get_system_fonts_filename
documentation:
Inspired by: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/10542832/how-to-use-fontconfig-to-get-font-list-c-c/14634033#14634033

Return an list of all the font installed.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.windows.version_helpers.WindowsVersionHelpers.is_windows_version_or_greater
documentation:
Parameters:
    windows_version: An object from getwindowsversion.
    major (int): The minimum major OS version number.
    minor (int): The minimum minor OS version number.
    build (int): The minimum build version number.
Returns:
    True if the specified version matches or if it is greater than the version of the current Windows OS. Otherwise, False.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.mac.version_helpers.MacVersionHelpers.is_mac_version_or_greater
documentation:
Parameters:
    major (int): The minimum major OS version number.
    minor (int): The minimum minor OS version number.
Returns:
    True if the specified version matches or if it is greater than the version of the current Mac OS. Otherwise, False.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.mac.mac_fonts.MacFonts._cfstring_to_string
documentation:
Parameters:
    cfstring (c_void_p): An CFString instance.
Returns:
    The decoded CFString.

methods.name: find_system_fonts_filename.mac.mac_fonts.MacFonts._cfnumber_to_uint32
documentation:
Parameters:
    cfnumber (c_void_p): An CFNumber instance.
Returns:
    The decoded CFNumber.
    If the CFNumber is not an int, it will raise an exception

functions.name: find_system_fonts_filename.fonts_filename.install_font
documentation:
Install a font from its filename

Args:
    add_font_to_registry: It will add the font in the Windows Registry.
        This argument is Windows Only.
        It adds the font to the Windows Registry only if the Windows version is 10.0.17083 (also known as version 1803) or later.
        Prior to this version, Windows did not support font registration in the registry.

functions.name: find_system_fonts_filename.fonts_filename.uninstall_font
documentation:
Uninstall a font from its filename

Args:
    remove_font_in_registry: It will also remove the Windows Registry entry that has been added
        when install_font with add_font_to_registry set to True has been called.
        This argument is Windows Only.
        It adds the font to the Windows Registry only if the Windows version is 10.0.17083 (also known as version 1803) or later.
        Prior to this version, Windows did not support font registration in the registry.
